name: LocalSecurityDecryptAES128ECB
title: LocalSecurityDecryptAES128ECB
tables: long LocalSecurityDecryptAES128ECB(BYTE[] key, dword keyLength, BYTE[] cipheredData, dword cipheredData Length, BYTE[] plainData, dword plainData Length)
Decrypts data with a given key and initialization vector. The decryption is AES128 (ECB), PKCS5 Padding.
key The key to be used for AES (128 bit)
cipheredData The ciphered data to decrypt
cipheredDataLength The length of the ciphered data
plainData The buffer in which the plain data is stored.
plainDataLength The length of the buffer. Typically this buffer should have the same length as the ciphered data buffer.
